mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (id, password, name, phone, role, created_data) VALUES (#{id}, #{password}, #{name}, #{phone}, #{role}, CURDATE())
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM users WHERE phone=#{phone} AND name=#{name}
SELECT password FROM users WHERE id=#{id} AND phone=#{phone}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_address (user_id, address, address_detail, address_comment, entrance, address_name) VALUES (#{userid}, #{address}, #{addressdetail}, #{addresscomment}, #{entrance}, #{addressname})
